HGSS.691.0001:
You’re really good with Pokémon!\f
Boys give me items after battles, but
sometimes they give me too much.\f
Next time, I can share some if you
want. Let me get your\r
phone number. [0200,0000]
HGSS.691.0002:
Next time a boy gives me something after
a battle, I’ll share with you!\f
Does that make me sound ungrateful?
HGSS.691.0003:
Aww, you don’t want anything?
But it’s all for free...
HGSS.691.0004:
I’ll share my gifts with you.\f
Let me get your phone number.[0200,0000]
HGSS.691.0005:
Hi! Are you here for your gift?\f
This should really make your day!\f
HGSS.691.0006:
Hey, tell me, don’t you think that the
sight of a girl on the phone is charming?\f
It’s not?\f
Ha ha ha, you’re nearby, aren’t you?
Why not come over here and talk in\r
person?
HGSS.691.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] is getting prettier!
I’ve been taking tons of pictures!\f
It took only a second to defeat a wild
[0100,000B,0000].\f
...Probably because you gave me some
battling tips last time!\f
Later!
HGSS.691.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000] is getting prettier!
I’ve been taking tons of pictures!\f
You know what? A wild [0100,000B,0000]
got away from me again.\f
It was so close!
Really, just a little bit more, and I\r
would’ve...\f
Later!
HGSS.691.0009:
Right now, I’m on [0104,0003,0000].\f
If you’re close by, let’s battle!
I’ll be waiting for you!
HGSS.691.0010:
Hi! You haven’t forgotten about your
promise to battle me, have you?\f
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.691.0011:
Oh! You wanted a gift, right?
I got one, but I want to keep this.\f
Can you wait a bit longer?
HGSS.691.0012:
You know what? I got a good gift!
As I promised, it’s yours!\f
I’m sure you’ll like it. Come and pick it
up! I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.691.0013:
Hello?\f
If you don’t come and get your present
soon, I’ll give it to someone else.\f
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
